description_long: This is a compact, open-sided electric vehicle with a flat, rectangular roof and seating for four passengers arranged in two rows. The exterior is predominantly white, with black structural supports and trim, and beige cushioned seats. The vehicle features a simple dashboard with a steering wheel on the left side, and large, rugged tires suitable for paved or moderately rough surfaces. The design is minimalistic, with no visible doors or windows, and the rear section is open for easy access to the back seats. The roof is supported by slender black pillars, providing shade but not full enclosure. This type of vehicle is commonly used for short-distance transport in urban parks, resorts, or gated communities.
description: A white, open-sided electric vehicle with a flat roof, beige seats for four, and black trim, designed for short-distance urban transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, flat roof, windshield, and front bumper with two large tires visible.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the open cabin, two rows of beige seats, steering wheel, and all four wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the open back, rear bumper, and the backrests of the beige seats.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the open structure, seating arrangement, and steering wheel position.
